value.stringValue: ACTION REQUIRED - New Job Role Request Submitted
Job Role/Rates have been created successfully. However, an error has occurred while emailing branch. Please notify them manually.
Request rejected but an error has occurred while emailing branch. Please notify them manually.
An error has occurred. Please notify central account team of the re-submitted request.
Your Request has been submitted successfully and will be reviewed by the Job Science Team

Flow.label: National Account New Job Role Approval

recordUpdates.name: Update_Rate_Card_Job_Role_ID
recordUpdates.label: Update Rate Card - Job Role ID

fields.name: Error_Screen
fields.fieldText:
An error has occurred while creating site or related contact or competency condition...

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: Let_branch_know_why_it_s_rejected
fields.fieldText: Let the requester know why this has been rejected:

textTemplates.name: Branch_Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
Your national account {!Staging_Record_Type} request for "{!Get_Staging_Job_Role.Job_Role__c}" has been approved. Click on the link below to see the job role and rates.

https://blue-arrow.lightning.force.com/{!Create_Job_Role}

textTemplates.name: Branch_Rates_Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
Your national account {!Staging_Record_Type} request for "{!Get_Staging_Job_Role.Job_Role_Link__r.Name}" has been approved. Click on the link below to see the job role and rates.

https://blue-arrow.lightning.force.com/{!recordId}

textTemplates.name: Reject_Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
Your recent request for the following national account {!Staging_Record_Type} has been rejected. Please see details below.

Job Role: {!Get_Staging_Job_Role.Job_Role__c}

Rejection Reason: {!Let_branch_know_why_it_s_rejected}

Click on the link below to see more details and resubmit your request.

https://blue-arrow.lightning.force.com/{!recordId}

textTemplates.name: Submission_Email_Body
textTemplates.text:
New national account {!Staging_Record_Type} request received. Click on the link below to review and approve the request.

https://blue-arrow.lightning.force.com/{!recordId}
